narrative:
Maumee City has 10,188 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.1 percentage points.
